strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Fullstack breadth spanning databases, APIs, frontend, and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes)
Berlin-based with proven platform-building track record relevant to portal work
concerns: Significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level entry-level position
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed; database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL
Only basic German, which may limit on-site collaboration in a German construction/consulting context

key_factors.factor: Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud infrastructure familiarity

response.justification: The candidate brings deeply relevant fullstack TypeScript, React, and Node.js experience along with DevOps and Kubernetes exposure that aligns well with the technical stack and nice-to-haves. However, their staff/senior-level trajectory is a substantial mismatch for an entry-level position, and gaps around PostgreSQL specifically and only basic German for an on-site German-market role introduce friction worth weighing carefully.
